root.m_Talk_VTN: T86qi sao ngay t87y 96e86wu c9580 l86qi ch86qy tr87en kh87ci m87kt ng9580i nh95p gi95pu c959?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why did you run away from a wealthy home in the first place?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why did you run away from a wealthy home in the first place?

root.m_Talk_ENG: My old-fashioned family is too boring.
root.m_Talk_VTN: Gia 96e95znh c87 9 h87w c87wa t9580i qu95q nh95pm ch95qn.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My old-fashioned family is too boring.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My old-fashioned family is too boring.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't get your hands dirty, you're a lady. Act like a lady. Don't fire cannons at people. They're always scolding me for no reason!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't get your hands dirty, you're a lady. Act like a lady. Don't fire cannons at people. They're always scolding me for no reason!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't get your hands dirty, you're a lady. Act like a lady. Don't fire cannons at people. They're always scolding me for no reason!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think that last one was your family's problem.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think that last one was your family's problem.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think that last one was your family's problem.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sonya, I told you. Pirates don't latch on to the past.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sonya, I told you. Pirates don't latch on to the past.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sonya, I told you. Pirates don't latch on to the past.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe it's a trend for rich girls to run away from home.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe it's a trend for rich girls to run away from home.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe it's a trend for rich girls to run away from home.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still. It's good you remembered the password to the safe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still. It's good you remembered the password to the safe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still. It's good you remembered the password to the safe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh.* You don't suppose your father's going to have the entire Eastern Coast Guard come after us, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh.* You don't suppose your father's going to have the entire Eastern Coast Guard come after us, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh.* You don't suppose your father's going to have the entire Eastern Coast Guard come after us, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Heh heh, don't worry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Heh heh, don't worry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Heh heh, don't worry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The safe on the ocean is my dad's secret stash of treasures he hid from the Administration in order to avoid paying taxes. So he won't be able to turn us in.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The safe on the ocean is my dad's secret stash of treasures he hid from the Administration in order to avoid paying taxes. So he won't be able to turn us in.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The safe on the ocean is my dad's secret stash of treasures he hid from the Administration in order to avoid paying taxes. So he won't be able to turn us in.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's... a relief.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's... a relief.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's... a relief.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is it...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is it...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is it...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Here ya go. The Credits you exchanged.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Here ya go. The Credits you exchanged.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Here ya go. The Credits you exchanged.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. You're quite fast for someone of your age.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. You're quite fast for someone of your age.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. You're quite fast for someone of your age.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem... Thanks for the kind words.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem... Thanks for the kind words.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem... Thanks for the kind words.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It would normally take a month to exchange all these gold bars, but the Administration's policy recently changed, and there are a lot of Credits going around.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It ain't that bad, since we pirate dealers can make money in fewer steps.

root.m_Talk_FRA: It ain't that bad, since we pirate dealers can make money in fewer steps.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. All right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. All right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. All right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, what's this? A tablet phone?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, what's this? A tablet phone?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, what's this? A tablet phone?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, that stench! It's suuuuper old!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, that stench! It's suuuuper old!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, that stench! It's suuuuper old!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You weren't listening to a word I was saying, were you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You weren't listening to a word I was saying, were you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You weren't listening to a word I was saying, were you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, it's on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, it's on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, it's on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's a map! Are there any other functions?
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's a map! Are there any other functions?
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's a map! Are there any other functions?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Give that back! What if you break it?!
root.m_Talk_VTN: N95py! Tr86s l86qi 96ei! L87q l95pm v87q n959 th95z sao?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Give that back! What if you break it?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Give that back! What if you break it?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, come on. I didn't think you'd be so petty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, come on. I didn't think you'd be so petty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, come on. I didn't think you'd be so petty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sure. But this isn't just a gaming device. It's a data pad containing the location of a specific place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sure. But this isn't just a gaming device. It's a data pad containing the location of a specific place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sure. But this isn't just a gaming device. It's a data pad containing the location of a specific place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A trustworthy friend left it with me before he was sent to prison.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A trustworthy friend left it with me before he was sent to prison.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A trustworthy friend left it with me before he was sent to prison.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's Avery's legacy, in fact.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's Avery's legacy, in fact.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's Avery's legacy, in fact.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A treasure map that used to be owned by the Great Pirate Avery! That's the dream!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A treasure map that used to be owned by the Great Pirate Avery! That's the dream!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A treasure map that used to be owned by the Great Pirate Avery! That's the dream!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, it's a treasure map at best. But no one knows what lies in the actual location.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, it's a treasure map at best. But no one knows what lies in the actual location.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, it's a treasure map at best. But no one knows what lies in the actual location.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pirates wander the ocean without settling in one place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pirates wander the ocean without settling in one place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pirates wander the ocean without settling in one place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So they hide something they cherish somewhere only they know, and leave a record of it like this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So they hide something they cherish somewhere only they know, and leave a record of it like this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So they hide something they cherish somewhere only they know, and leave a record of it like this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh! That's the dream!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh! That's the dream!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh! That's the dream!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I want to buy that!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I want to buy that!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I want to buy that!
